certificate.permits_boundary:
permits:
  exec: false
  tools: ["nika:fetch", "nika:write"]

# review — effects too dynamic to pin statically:
#   · task `map` reaches a dynamic URL — `net.http` cannot express 'any host'; add the resolved host(s) before running
#   · task `top_page` reaches a dynamic URL — `net.http` cannot express 'any host'; add the resolved host(s) before running
#   · task `save` uses a dynamic path — `fs` cannot express 'any path'; add the resolved path(s) before running
